0s6zi9dyw22qo4rp.question: What is the difference between the average of September 1896 until December 1896 and the average of January 1897 until April 1897?

steps.text: Select the four bars from September 1896 through December 1896 and compute their mean fatality rate.
Select the four bars from January 1897 through April 1897 and compute their mean fatality rate.
Subtract the earlier-period mean from the later-period mean.

11e148qcs7x70t8v.question: in which years does south korea have a bigger value than france?

steps.text: Locate the South Korea and France segments within each stacked bar for every Period and compare their Share_of_Import_Value values.
List the Periods where South Korea’s value is greater than France’s value.

16fif5hdi8yzml00.question: What is the difference between average of maximum payment in all states and average of minimum payment in all states?

steps.text: Collect the bar heights for the Maximum type across all state panels and compute their average.
Gather the bar heights for the Minimum type across all state panels and compute their average.
Subtract the minimum-type average from the maximum-type average.

2jromeq5u9lloh1s.question: Which years has the biggest jump?

steps.text: Calculate the year-to-year change in Audience_Millions between each pair of consecutive years on the line. Compare these changes to find the largest increase.
Select the later year of the pair with the maximum increase.

4pi1e6ev8e0zobww.question: Find the difference between the average of the first three years of the male group and the average of the last three years of the female group

steps.text: Select the male values for the first three years shown on the chart and compute their average.
Select the female values for the last three years shown on the chart and compute their average.
Subtract the male average from the female average to get the difference.
